description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof structure and several protruding sections. The exterior is primarily finished in muted gray tones, with a combination of shingled and smooth surfaces. A prominent covered porch with visible support columns extends from the central section, providing a welcoming entryway. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a modern yet homey appearance. The property includes a paved area and what appears to be a detached or semi-detached garage structure. Landscaping elements such as rocks and a small patio area are visible, enhancing the residential feel.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, covered porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement in muted gray tones.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the covered porch, central entryway, and the main roofline with visible support columns.
description_view_1: This side/rear view shows the complex roof structure, detached garage, and some landscaping elements like rocks and a patio.
description_view_2: The back view reveals additional roof angles, rear windows, and the paved area extending from the house.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the side of the bungalow, the porch area, and the arrangement of the garage and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
